title: Buildering
description: A creative building and testing focused pack made to give as many tools as possible to the player and make collaboration easier via Essentials
body:
This pack gives as many tools as i could find for building and testing

I recommend looking at the tools in the keybinds, most other keys have been unbound
<details>
<summary>Notable Keybinds</summary>
  
# Defualt Keybinds
  
- G - Fullbright
- Left Alt - Axiom Context Menu
- Right Shift - Axiom Editor UI
- R - Axiom Replace
- X - Axiom Jump To Block
- C - Zoom - C
- J - Open Map
- B - Litematica Nudge
- Grave - Flexible Block Placement Rotation (Tweakeroo)
- K+L - Litematica Execute Operation
- H - MiniHUD Render Toggle
- Y - Toggle CUI Visibility
- N - Flashback Create Marker
- I - G4me Speed Menu
# Command Keys
- Numpad * - Edit Command Keys (This allows you to make new profiles of macros)
## Tick Profile (Default)
- Numpad 0 - Freeze Time
- Numpad . - Unfreeze Time
- Numpad 1 - Step 1 Tick
- Numpad 2 - Step 10 Ticks
- Numpad 3 - Input Tick Step
- Numpad 4 - Tick Sprint 60 Seconds
- Numpad 5 - Shmungus
- Numpad 6 - Tick Sprint Input
## Effect Profile
(You can change to this profile by going into the command keys menu with * and going to Switch Profile, there you can also change the profile to your Singleplayer Default)
- Numpad 0 - Effect Clear
- Numpad . - Effect Give Saturation
- Numpad 1 - Effect Give Regeneration
- Numpad 2 - Effect Give Speed 2
- Numpad 3 - Effect Give Jump Boost 2
- Numpad 4 - Effect Give Haste
- Numpad 5 - Shmungus
- Numpad 6 - Effect Give Resistance 2
- Numpad 7 - Effect Give Strength 2
- Numpad 8 - Effect Give Invisibility
- Numpad 9 - Effect Give Levitation
</details>

<details>
<summary>Notable Mods</summary>
  
# General Mods
- Essentials
- Scribble
- Full Brightness Toggle (Default G)
- Redstone Tweaks (Configurable Resource Pack)
- WI Zoom (Can be replaced)

# Building Mods
- Axiom
- WorldEdit
- Tweakeroo
- Litematica
- Image2Map

# Technical Mods
- MiniHUD
- Carpet & Carpet TIS Addition
- Command Keys
- NBT Autocomplete
- NBT Copy
</details>

Axiom Docs: [https://axiomdocs.moulberry.com](https://axiomdocs.moulberry.com)

WorldEdit Docs: [https://worldedit.enginehub.org/en/latest/](https://worldedit.enginehub.org/en/latest/)

A creative building and testing focused pack made to give as many tools as possible to the player and make collaboration easier via Essentials, now updated for 1.21.7
